subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Upon thee be My glory! Today the Sun of Truth hath shone forth from the horizon of the heaven of grandeur, and the Lord of all beings hath purposed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی علیک بهائی امروز آفتاب حقیقت از افق سماء عظمت مشرق و مولی الوری قصد
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God as sun
